title: Exact unique-value KQL miss repair and bounded conclusion discipline
system_surface: Gemini DCOIR query repair and zero-result evidence discipline

turns.speaker: user
turns.content: The exact KQL query process.entity_id: "abc123-unique-process-entity" returned zero results in logs-* for the alert window. Should we stop here, or should Gemini broaden the search?
allowed_assumptions: The exact fielded process.entity_id query returned zero results in the reviewed lane.
The unique value should be preserved for auditability.
A field mismatch, mapping mismatch, overrestrictive filter, index scope, or time-window issue could explain the miss.
disallowed_assumptions: The value is absent from the enterprise.
The miss proves benignity, stealth, log clearing, maliciousness, or compromise.
Gemini executed additional searches that were not returned.
forbidden_markers: benign because there were no results
search all indexes for all time
turns.scoring_notes: The answer should keep the exact value, bound the miss to the searched lane, and recommend one smallest query repair or broadening step without overclaiming.

turn-001: The reviewed query was process.entity_id: "abc123-unique-process-entity" in logs-* for the alert window.
No alternate field, field-agnostic KQL, wider time range, or alternate index search has returned evidence yet.
No returned evidence proves absence, benignity, stealth, log clearing, maliciousness, execution, or compromise.

expected_behaviors: Preserve the exact unique value and original objective.
State that the miss is bounded to the reviewed lane, field, index, and time range.
Name a plausible repair dimension before broadening.
Recommend one controlled repair step such as field-agnostic exact-value KQL or mixed free-text plus one reliable named constraint.
Avoid claiming absence, benignity, stealth, maliciousness, log clearing, execution, compromise, or enterprise-wide coverage from the miss.
forbidden_behaviors: Treat one exact miss as proof that the value is absent.
Treat one exact miss as proof of stealth, log clearing, maliciousness, or benignity.
Repeat the same failed query shape without explaining the repair.
Claim that additional enterprise searches were executed without returned evidence.
forbidden_markers: benign because there were no results
search all indexes for all time
expected_next_move_shapes: Try one repaired query shape that changes the suspected failure dimension, such as field-agnostic exact-value KQL while preserving the value and reliable host/time constraints.
